GroupOwnerTypeEnum.description: Type of entity that owns a service group.
GroupOwnerTypeEnum.title: GroupOwnerTypeEnum

GroupTypeEnum.description:
Type of service group.

- ``regular``: Enrollable, services-bearing group (the common case).
- ``category``: Non-enrollable parent that organizes child groups.
- ``misc``: System-generated catch-all for uncategorized services.
GroupTypeEnum.title: GroupTypeEnum

description:
Service group file model with schema version validation.

Example file:
```json
{
    "schema": "service_group_v1",
    "name": "my-llm-services",
    "display_name": "My LLM Services",
    "description": "LLM services for targeted promotions",
    "membership_rules": {
        "expression": "service_type == 'llm'"
    },
    "status": "private"
}
```

access_interface_data_template.description: Jinja2 template that renders to AccessInterfaceData JSON when populated with service data. Used by admin to auto-generate group-scoped AccessInterfaces.
access_interface_data_template.title: Access Interface Data Template

group_type.description: Type of group: regular (enrollable), category (non-enrollable parent), or misc (system-generated catch-all).

membership_rules.description:
Rules for automatic service membership. Format: {"expression": "<python_expression>"}
Available variables: service_id, seller_id, provider_id, seller_name, provider_name, name, display_name, service_type, status, listing_type, tags, is_featured
membership_rules.title: Membership Rules

name.description: URL-friendly slug, unique per owner (e.g., 'my-llm-services'). Lowercase ASCII alphanumeric plus '-' / '_', must start with a letter or digit. Used as the public identifier in customer SDK paths, so changing it is a breaking change for callers.
name.title: Name

owner_id.description: Owner ID (UUID string). For platform groups, the backend fills in the platform-superuser ID when omitted; for seller/customer groups it must be supplied.
owner_id.title: Owner Id

parent_group_name.description: Parent group name for hierarchy (resolved to ancestor_path by the backend). Must itself be a valid group slug.
parent_group_name.title: Parent Group Name

title: ServiceGroupV1
